title: Add full-quality mode to mirror GitHub Standard findings
description: Introduce a scan mode that runs full-repo code-quality analysis (ignoring codescanning config path restrictions) to approximate GitHub Security & quality Standard findings counts.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing new scan mode flag for GitHub Standard findings parity: force code-quality profile and full-repo extraction scope by bypassing codescanning config during database create.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Added new CLI scan mode: --mode standard-findings. Behavior: force code-quality suite and bypass codescanning config during database creation to scan full repository scope for GitHub Security & quality standard findings parity. Validation: make check, pytest -q (129 passed), and Biblicus run rcql --lang python --mode standard-findings --quiet --no-fail produced 896 findings including empty-except class signals.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Shipped in commit d2aa706 on develop. New --mode standard-findings now forces code-quality and full-repo extraction scope to mirror GitHub Standard findings behavior.
